subscription_start_date.description: When monthly subscription started (ONLY for monthly subscribers, NOT for VIP)

subscription_end_date.description: When monthly subscription ends (ONLY for cancelled monthly users, NOT for VIP)

vip_member.description: True if user is in first 100 with lifetime access (no dates needed)

vip_spot_number.description: Their spot number out of 100 (1-100) for lifetime VIP members
